overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night, entering a transit station and ascending multiple levels of red-carpeted stairs and walkways while following other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city street with neon billboards and futuristic traffic

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet city street, observing passing traffic and neon-lit buildings

notable_agents.action: futuristic car with teal neon underglow driving past on the wet street

entered.detail: rain-soaked black asphalt with reflective puddles and yellow crosswalk stripes
tall buildings covered in glowing digital advertisements and neon signage
cyberpunk-style cars with glowing neon trim driving along the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street at night, with the camera walking forward along wet asphalt. Futuristic vehicles with neon underglow pass by on the right, while towering buildings covered in digital billboards line the street. The atmosphere is dense with neon reflections on the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance with covered walkway and stair approach

events.description: moving from open street into covered entrance area of the Delamain building

agents.ego_description: approaching the building entrance and following two pedestrians toward the illuminated staircase

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright pink jacket walking ahead toward the stairs
pedestrian in green jacket ascending the red-carpeted stairs

entered.detail: green architectural structure with illuminated signage and red-carpeted escalator entrance
overhanging green metal canopy covering the entrance stairs

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open street into a covered entrance area, following two pedestrians toward a distinctive green structure with the Delamain logo. The environment transitions from exposed wet pavement to a sheltered concrete walkway leading to a red-carpeted staircase illuminated with yellow neon edges.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit red carpeted staircase ascending between green walls

events.description: beginning ascent of the long red-carpeted staircase with yellow neon railings

agents.ego_description: climbing the red stairs while following the two pedestrians ahead

entered.detail: wide staircase covered in red carpet with yellow neon strip lighting along each step edge
continuous yellow glowing light strip running along the left handrail
dark green structural wall panels lining the left side of the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a long, enclosed staircase covered in red carpet with distinctive yellow neon lighting along the edges. The walls are dark green metal panels, and the ceiling is low and industrial. The two pedestrians continue climbing ahead, their clothing glowing under the artificial lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper concourse with vending machines and digital advertisements

events.description: reaching top of stairs and entering commercial concourse with vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper concourse, passing vending machines and digital billboards while turning toward the next ascent

entered.detail: futuristic vending machine with red neon signage displaying 'BARGHEST'
large digital screen displaying 'ZEIG DICH' advertisement in white text on pink background
red and black patterned metal flooring with scattered debris

segments.scene_description: Upon reaching the top of the stairs, the scene opens into an indoor commercial concourse with red metal flooring. Vending machines and large digital billboards line the walls, including a prominent pink 'ZEIG DICH' advertisement. The character turns and walks toward another stairway while the city becomes visible through large windows to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with glass windows overlooking the city street

events.description: ascending secondary staircase to reach upper walkway level

agents.ego_description: climbing the secondary stairs and walking along the elevated walkway with views of the street below

notable_agents.action: pedestrian descending the stairs in the opposite direction

entered.detail: smaller red-carpeted staircase with yellow lighting leading to upper level
floor-to-ceiling glass windows providing views of the city street below
large advertisement for 'EEZY BEEF' showing a synthetic meat product

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a secondary staircase to an elevated walkway lined with large windows overlooking the neon-lit city street below. The area features prominent digital advertisements including one for 'EEZY BEEF' synthetic meat. The walkway has red flooring with yellow neon accent lighting along the base of the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit observation platform with seating and city views

events.description: arriving at upper transit platform with seating area and panoramic city views

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the platform, observing the city view through the glass barriers

entered.detail: wide open platform area with red flooring and overhead structural beams
green cushioned benches along the left wall for waiting passengers
transparent safety barrier overlooking the street level far below

segments.scene_description: The final segment arrives at an upper transit platform with seating benches and wide glass barriers offering views down to the city streets. The area is spacious with red flooring and industrial ceiling structures, serving as an observation deck above the neon-lit urban environment below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-soaked cyberpunk street into the ascending levels of a neon-lit transit hub. It begins by walking along wet asphalt beneath towering digital billboards and passing vehicles with neon underglow, before moving into a sheltered concrete entrance toward a green Delamain structure. The camera then ascends a long, industrial staircase with red carpeting and yellow neon edges, following two pedestrians upward through dark green metal corridors. As the character reaches the top, the scene opens into a commercial concourse filled with vending machines and pink advertisements before shifting toward a secondary staircase and an elevated walkway. Finally, the movement culminates on a spacious upper transit platform with red flooring and wide glass barriers that overlook the glowing urban environment below.
